select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,
[source_table].imprv_det_id,
[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

[source_table].prop_val_yr,

[source_table].num_units,

[source_table].stories_multiplier,

[source_table].actual_year_built_override,

[source_table].flat_value_user_id,

[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0  

join ccUpSyncQueue as [refresh_list] with (nolock) 
on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 2

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 5

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 9

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 174

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,
[source_table].imprv_det_id,
[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0  

join ccUpSyncQueue as [refresh_list] with (nolock) 
on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 213

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 250

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 255

imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 365

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 411

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,
[source_table].imprv_det_id,
[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0  

join ccUpSyncQueue as [refresh_list] with (nolock) 
on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 448

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 452

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 460

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 464

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0  

join ccUpSyncQueue as [refresh_list] with (nolock) 
on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 600 

select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,
[source_table].imprv_det_id,
[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,

condition_cd,

actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,

override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,

cubic_area,

imprv_det_flat_val,

functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,

new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 601

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 604

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,

[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 697

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 701

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 709

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 769

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 918

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on

select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,
[source_table].imprv_det_id,
[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0  

join ccUpSyncQueue as [refresh_list] with (nolock) 
on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 980

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 984

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1002

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1006

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1010

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and

select [source_table].prop_id,
[source_table].prop_val_yr,
[source_table].imprv_id,
[source_table].imprv_det_id,
[source_table].sup_num,
[source_table].sale_id,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_class_cd) as imprv_det_class_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_meth_cd) as imprv_det_meth_cd,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_type_cd) as imprv_det_type_cd,
[source_table].seq_num,
[source_table].imprv_det_val,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_val_source) as imprv_det_val_source,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_desc) as imprv_det_desc,
[source_table].imprv_det_area,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_area_type) as imprv_det_area_type,
rtrim([source_table].condition_cd) as condition_cd,
[source_table].cubic_area,
[source_table].calc_area,
[source_table].sketch_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_area) as override_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_cubic_area) as override_cubic_area,
rtrim([source_table].override_perimeter) as override_perimeter,
[source_table].perimeter,
[source_table].length,
[source_table].width,
[source_table].height,
[source_table].unit_price,
[source_table].yr_built,
[source_table].depreciation_yr,
rtrim([source_table].depreciation_yr_override) as depreciation_yr_override,
[source_table].imprv_det_adj_val,
[source_table].imprv_det_flat_val,
[source_table].economic_pct,
[source_table].physical_pct,
[source_table].functional_pct,
rtrim([source_table].economic_pct_override) as economic_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].physical_pct_override) as physical_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].functional_pct_override) as functional_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].economic_cmnt) as economic_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].physical_cmnt) as physical_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].functional_cmnt) as functional_cmnt,
[source_table].percent_complete,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_override) as percent_complete_override,
rtrim([source_table].percent_complete_cmnt) as percent_complete_cmnt,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_flag) as new_value_flag,
[source_table].new_value,
rtrim([source_table].new_value_override) as new_value_override,
rtrim([source_table].use_up_for_pct_base) as use_up_for_pct_base,
[source_table].dep_pct,
rtrim([source_table].dep_pct_override) as dep_pct_override,
rtrim([source_table].imprv_det_sub_class_cd) as imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
[source_table].num_units,
[source_table].num_stories,
[source_table].stories_multiplier,
rtrim([source_table].lease_class) as lease_class,
[source_table].actual_year_built_override,
rtrim([source_table].flat_value_comment) as flat_value_comment,
[source_table].flat_value_user_id,
[source_table].flat_value_date,
[source_table].floor_number,
[source_table].load_factor,
[source_table].net_rentable_area,
[source_table].imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
[source_table].custom_calc_area_display,
[source_table].custom_perimeter_display,
[source_table].custom_imprv_detail_sketch
into imprv_detail_rows  from (
select
-- display fields forced into schema. Used for UI calculations. These are never synced.
null as custom_calc_area_display,
null as custom_perimeter_display,
id.prop_id,
id.prop_val_yr,
id.imprv_id,
imprv_det_id,
id.sup_num,
id.sale_id,
seq_num,
imprv_det_type_cd,
imprv_det_meth_cd,
imprv_det_class_cd,
imprv_det_sub_class_cd,
lease_class,
condition_cd,
unit_price,
num_units,
num_stories,
yr_built,
actual_year_built_override,
depreciation_yr,
depreciation_yr_override,
use_up_for_pct_base,
stories_multiplier,
length,
width,
height,
perimeter,
override_perimeter,
imprv_det_area,
imprv_det_area_type,
calc_area,
override_area,
sketch_area,
load_factor,
net_rentable_area,
new_value_flag,
imprv_det_val_source,
imprv_det_val,
imprv_det_desc,
cubic_area,
override_cubic_area,
imprv_det_adj_val,
imprv_det_flat_val,
dep_pct,
dep_pct_override,
economic_pct,
economic_pct_override,
economic_cmnt,
physical_pct,
physical_pct_override,
physical_cmnt,
functional_pct,
functional_pct_override,
functional_cmnt,
percent_complete,
percent_complete_override,
percent_complete_cmnt,
new_value,
new_value_override,
flat_value_comment,
flat_value_user_id,
flat_value_date,
floor_number,
imprv_det_cost_unit_price,
imprvs.sketch as custom_imprv_detail_sketch 

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0  

join ccUpSyncQueue as [refresh_list] with (nolock) 
on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1261

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1265

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1279

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1287

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

from imprv_detail as id with (nolock) 
left join imprv_sketch as imprvs with (nolock) on 
imprvs.prop_id = id.prop_id and 
imprvs.prop_val_yr = id.prop_val_yr and 
imprvs.imprv_id = id.imprv_id and 
imprvs.sup_num = id.sup_num and 
imprvs.sale_id = id.sale_id ) as [source_table]  
 join ccProperty as [join_table] with (nolock) 
	on [source_table].prop_val_yr = [join_table].prop_val_yr and [source_table].sup_num = [join_table].sup_num 
	and [source_table].prop_id = [join_table].prop_id
	and [source_table].sale_id = 0

on [join_table].prop_id = [refresh_list].prop_id  where [refresh_list].run_id = 1322
